description_long: This is a modern, compact sofa upholstered in a dark gray fabric with a subtle, slightly mottled texture. The sofa features a continuous, rounded backrest and armrests that are integrated into the main body, giving it a sleek and unified appearance. Three loose, square cushions in varying pastel shades and patterns are arranged along the backrest, providing both comfort and visual contrast. The seat is wide and flat, with no visible seams or divisions, and the armrests are thick and padded, matching the height of the backrest. The base of the sofa is boxy and extends to the floor, with no visible legs or underframe. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or apartment living rooms.
description: A dark gray, boxy sofa with a rounded backrest and armrests, featuring three pastel accent cushions. The design is minimalist, with a continuous seat and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, rounded backrest and armrest, with the three accent cushions partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the sofa, the three distinct accent cushions, and the continuous seat surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the sofa's depth and the arrangement of the cushions against the backrest.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth, uninterrupted backrest and the boxy base, with no cushions or detailing visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, square back cushions in varied pastel colors and patterns, evenly spaced along the backrest; no visible seat cushions, single continuous seat.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, thick, and fully integrated with the backrest, featuring a rounded, padded profile at the same height as the backrest, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is a solid, boxy plinth that extends to the floor, giving the appearance of a legless or hidden-leg design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and rounded backrest that is integrated with the armrests, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is a solid dark gray fabric with a subtle, mottled texture; accent cushions feature varied patterns including geometric and quilted designs.
